content.full_text:
October 15, 2002

James C. Harrison
Remcho, Johansen & Purcell
201 Delores Avenue
San Leandro, CA 94577

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-162

Dear Mr. Harrison:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of October 9, 2002, you have withdrawn your pending request for formal advice.

Please do not hesitate to contact me at (916) 322-5660 if you have additional questions relating to the Political Reform Act.¹

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

[Signature]
By:
Hyla P. Wagner
Senior Commission Counsel

HPW:jg

¹ Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
